title: Mothics
description: Ever wanted some cute fluffy fellas instead of boring totems taking half of your screen all the time? You're welcome.
body:
Mothics. I... don't know what else to say about them, but they're cute.
I initially made them for my friend, but why not share?
Enjoy your fluffy Mothics all you desire, and if you do use them somewhere, ping me. I'd be glad to know I am useful >:]
